source: Clients can access the dashboard from any computer.
target: Los clientes pueden acceder al panel desde cualquier ordenador.
note: Peninsular-only 'ordenador' (neutral es-419 uses 'computadora'). Listed in locale regional_flags.peninsular; with no active neutralization rule the validator flags it for human routing.

source: The lifestyle segment includes financing for a new car.
target: El segmento de estilo de vida incluye financiamiento para un coche nuevo.
note: Peninsular-only 'coche' (neutral uses 'automóvil/vehículo/carro'). Flagged from regional_flags.peninsular; no active rule means it stays unresolved and the validator fails it.

source: Alerts are delivered to the client's mobile phone.
target: Las alertas se envían al móvil del cliente.
note: Peninsular-only 'móvil' for mobile phone (neutral 'teléfono móvil/celular'). Listed in regional_flags.peninsular; validator flags it for neutralization.

source: Advisors meet quarterly to talk through the client's goals.
target: Los asesores se reúnen trimestralmente para platicar sobre las metas del cliente.
note: Mexican-only colloquialism 'platicar' (neutral 'conversar/hablar'). Listed in regional_flags.mexican; clashes cross-market, so the validator flags it.

source: Operations will check the settlement instructions before release.
target: Operaciones va a checar las instrucciones de liquidación antes de liberar.
note: Mexican-only colloquialism 'checar' (neutral 'verificar/revisar'). Listed in regional_flags.mexican; validator flags it for neutralization.

source: Clients can check the dashboard from any computer or mobile phone.
target: Los clientes pueden revisar el panel desde cualquier computadora o teléfono celular.
note: Clean neutral es-419: 'computadora', 'teléfono celular', 'revisar' — none of the flagged Peninsular or Mexican lexicon is present, so the validator passes.
